channel.title: Example Port Authority — public notices
channel.description: Synthetic test fixture. Not a real publisher feed.

item.title: Notice 2026-014: temporary draft restriction at Berth 3
item.description: A temporary maximum draft applies at Berth 3 while survey work is carried out. Vessel scheduling is unaffected.

item.title: Notice 2026-015: revised pilotage booking window
item.description: The pilotage booking window is revised with effect from 15 July 2026.
